title: Glowing Ores for Programmer Art Continuation (PACP)
description: Resource Pack for the Programmer Art Continuation Project (PACP) Resource Pack allowing the ores to glow when using shaders
body:
(shaders required) Have you installed the Programmer Art Continuation Project Resource Pack played with shaders and disaponted that the ores dont glow? well no problem! the texture pack in action :0
![the texture pack in action :0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ybuo3WvC/images/fe7bbe1aa1a9d29d04b4570e2e296bcc8bdf25f7.png)
this allows the ores to glow like most shaders allow you to do.

thanks to Programmer Art Continuation Project Resource Pack for making the Resource Pack in the 1st place! :D
